today.emptyBody: Choose your city to see today's prayer times. Everything stays on your phone — nothing is sent anywhere.

cityPicker.title: Choose your city
cityPicker.noMatch: No match — try the nearest big city.
cityPicker.hint: Type a city name, e.g. Houston.

quran.title: Quran
quran.devBadge: DEV translation (Pickthall, 1930) — final translation pending review

qibla.title: Qibla
qibla.comingSoon: The qibla compass is coming in an upcoming update.

more.title: Settings
more.hint: Prayer time settings. If you are not sure, the automatic options follow the most common conventions for your region.
more.notificationsHint: Get a reminder at each prayer time. Your phone's silent switch and Focus modes can mute these — that is an iPhone setting, not the app.
more.nightWarmDesc: Amber tones in the Quran reader, easier on the eyes before dawn
more.privacyNote: DeenDawn stores everything on your phone. No account, no ads, no tracking.
more.restartBody: Switching the app language needs a quick restart to change the layout direction.

methods.Tehran: Institute of Geophysics, University of Tehran
